---
title: "bifrost.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\engine\bifrost.py"
loc: 20
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.22
style_score: 3.76
intel_score: 5.40
overall_score: 5.07
---

## Intent
The `bifrost.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on SkillForge, __init__, record_failure, analyze_voids, synthesize_bridge. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via SkillForge, __init__, record_failure, analyze_voids, synthesize_bridge. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 5 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.core.engine.vector](file://src.core.engine.vector)

### Exports
- `SkillForge`
- `__init__`
- `record_failure`
- `analyze_voids`
- `synthesize_bridge`
